questions.question: Describe the primary functions of an operating system. (1 mark)
questions.hint: Primary functions include process management and memory management

questions.question: What is the difference between hardware and software in a computer system? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Hardware refers to the physical components, while software refers to the programs and operating systems

questions.question: Explain the concept of input/output devices and their importance in a computer system. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Input devices (e.g., keyboard) receive data, while output devices (e.g., monitor) display results
